// FIXTURE (not compiled — .rs.txt). A deliberate module-DAG reverse edge used by
// scripts/check-module-dag.sh's --self-test: `core` must never reference
// `crate::audio`. The guard must FLAG both the symbol form and this bare
// module-level form. Keep this file OUT of the Rust build (it is .rs.txt, and
// tests/fixtures is not a source root).
#[allow(unused_imports)]
use crate::audio;
fn _bare_module_edge() { let _ = crate::audio::get_device_enumerator(); }
